blog_title: T-Shirt Business With Zero Marketing Budget — ₹0 to ₹10 Lakh/Month Real Story (2017–2026)
caption:
₹40k in first 6 months. Zero ads. Zero budget. 😬

In 2017, I messaged 30 print shops daily on Instagram. No investor. No connections. People said quit — margins are dead.

But quality spoke louder than marketing spend. Repeat orders came. By 2019: ₹1.5L/month. Today: ₹10L+/month from word-of-mouth alone.

Your product IS your marketing.

Save this if you're sourcing blanks for your next bulk order 👇
